components.condition: Run before planning, write-intent, resume, or final-output for every non-trivial user message.
components.description: Mandatory user-message join point that records input-filter facts before processing.
components.gate_label: ai_client_governance.py lifecycle input-filter + task-record gate --event preflight
components.performance_budget: single message parse plus SQLite gate; no repository scan

components.condition: Run at host-client capability boundaries before repository writes or important shell commands. The default raw-shell strategy is local command-proxy activation, like a Python virtual environment; it must not modify user profiles, PATH, terminal settings, or global shell behavior.
components.description: Bridge host-client write/shell capabilities to lifecycle, task-record, and local command-proxy facts.

metadata.profile_shim_policy: explicit opt-in only; not a default enforcement path

components.performance_budget: single SQLite fact check plus optional telemetry read; no profile writes

components.condition: Run before write-intent, final-output, or resume gates so audits can identify which client/model combinations skipped the standard flow.
components.description: Record the current AI client and model identity for audit correlation.

metadata.shell_coverage_pair: raw shell coverage is audited separately by shell-adapter diagnostics
metadata.unknown_policy: record explicit unknown values instead of omitting identity

components.performance_budget: constant-time CLI/env/default identity capture; no repository scan

components.condition: Run for every new user, web, file, tool, agent, or history input.
components.description: Classify input source and trust boundary.

components.condition: Run before planning or write-intent when a user message contains facts, diagnoses, approvals, or execution claims that may be wrong, stale, or conflict with live state.
components.description: Classify user assertions separately from user goals before they steer execution.
components.performance_budget: local message segmentation and risk flags only; verification commands are planned separately

components.condition: Run for medium/large, mutating, rules-script, correction, git/worktree, long-running, or user-requested multi-agent work. Not spawning agents still requires a reason and alternate validation.
components.description: Record whether to spawn, reuse, defer, or skip sub-agents before larger work proceeds.
components.performance_budget: constant-size decision record; any history or code scan is a separate confirmation step

components.condition: Run before planning or write-intent for every medium/large or mutating task.
components.description: Record confirmed data sources and unchecked boundaries before claims or history steer execution.
components.performance_budget: records confirmation facts only; expensive verification belongs to validation commands

components.condition: Run for correction, rules-script, multi-agent, long-running, or messages such as 'previously said', 'keeps forgetting', or 'find them all'.
components.description: Recover repeated user process requirements from available history before correction or framework work.
components.performance_budget: bounded scan of declared history sources; long files should use context-extract

components.condition: Run before important Windows PowerShell commands. Complex command strings should use shell-adapter proxy-powershell --powershell-command-file. The proxy is local/no-profile and must not alter user shell profiles, PATH, terminal settings, or global behavior.
components.description: Record the PowerShell proxy plan or gated exception before important local commands run.

metadata.final_required: used_proxy=true with enforcement_mode=non-invasive-command-proxy, profile_policy=no_profile, profile_touched=false, user_shell_impact=none, or exception_reason

components.performance_budget: constant-size policy record; diagnostics are a separate readonly gate

components.condition: Run before readonly audits or status commands. Commands such as --record-state or sync-check state writes are forbidden when readonly_contract=true.
components.description: Record whether a task is truly readonly and whether DB/status writes are allowed.
components.performance_budget: constant-size policy record; file/DB hashing is a separate validation command

components.condition: Run when the input contains a user goal, correction, approval, or new constraint.
components.description: Split user input into stable REQ rows.

components.condition: Run after requirement decomposition and before task tracking decisions.
components.description: Decide whether each requirement must be recorded.

components.condition: Run when user input or task type may depend on current or external facts.
components.description: Decide whether external search or URL evidence is required.

components.condition: Run when the user asks for implementation, plan, redesign, correction, or completion.
components.description: Extract user-visible acceptance criteria before execution.

components.condition: Run when repository, project, or global skills may match the user's request.
components.description: Select candidate skills as capability plugins without bypassing governance gates.
Keep web facts separate from user instructions.
Require task tracking for medium, large, and gated work.

components.condition: Run before gated work so the AI sees required fields and enums before writing.
components.description: Describe typed task-record fields before execution.
components.performance_budget: local JSON/text render; no repo scan

components.condition: Run before editing or expensive validation; if scope, non-goals, risks, or acceptance are unclear, stop before write-intent instead of compensating with broad tests at closeout.
components.description: Require a clear task analysis contract before write-intent.

metadata.budget_policy: required validation checks must fit the declared budget unless explicitly upgraded

components.performance_budget: local path classification and constant-size analysis fields; no repository scan

components.condition: Run before diagnostics, repository writes, stage/commit, or closeout; commit approval never implies push approval.
components.description: Require explicit plan, approval, commit, and push boundaries before execution.
components.performance_budget: constant-time task-record payload check; no repository scan

components.condition: Run before write-intent or final-output for every medium/large or mutating task; prefer one local task-run/gate-pool/telemetry pass over repeated model-mediated command selection.
components.description: Analyze whether newly generated local commands can be deduped, batched, or replaced by a local runner.

metadata.telemetry_policy: write execution spans to aicg.db through task-run, gate-pool, shell-adapter, telemetry record, or the command adapter; host-native raw shell prevention requires host-client integration

components.performance_budget: local command list normalization and grouping only; no repository scan unless explicit commands do it

components.condition: Run before write-intent or final-output for every mutating task, including small edits; the medium/large node covers large non-mutating planning while this node closes the mutation gap.
components.description: Analyze command compression for mutating tasks even when they are classified as small.

metadata.telemetry_policy: write execution spans to aicg.db through task-run, gate-pool, shell-adapter, telemetry record, or the command adapter; host-native raw shell prevention requires host-client integration

components.performance_budget: local command list normalization and grouping only; no repository scan unless explicit commands do it

components.condition: Run whenever a task may touch rules, scripts, skills, records, or project files; common facts stay in ai-client-governance and project-specific facts stay in .ai-client/project or native project assets.
components.description: Classify each task as common governance, project specialization, native project, or mixed before write-intent.
components.gate_label: ai_client_governance.py task-record gate checks scope-classification trigger
components.performance_budget: local path and command-token classification only

components.condition: Run when scripts generate coord sessions, locks, lifecycle state, doc-index, pycache, or selftest artifacts; generated telemetry must be repaired by scripts, not hand-edited.
components.description: Require script-generated state and artifacts to declare owner and cleanup commands.
components.performance_budget: constant-time manifest check plus optional owner-command validation

components.condition: Run before applying patches to long files, frequently edited governance files, or files touched by multiple worktrees.
components.description: Require stable anchors and small-step patches before editing long or hot files.
components.performance_budget: local rg/context-extract only; no broad repository scan

components.condition: Run after command-compression analysis when local commands are deterministic enough to execute; readonly and validation groups may parallelize/cache, stateful groups remain ordered and no-cache.
components.description: Execute compressed command groups through the local task-run DAG runner when commands are ready to run.

metadata.observability: trace_json plus execution telemetry spans in aicg.db
metadata.uncacheable: stateful/sequential commands and live worktree probes such as git status/git diff

components.performance_budget: single local DAG pass; cache only readonly/validation nodes with declared inputs; telemetry writes to aicg.db are mandatory by default

components.condition: Run when a structured task id exists; fail before processing or final output if input-filter facts or required rows are missing.
components.description: Require typed SQLite task records for gated work.
components.performance_budget: single SQLite read; no Markdown parsing

components.description: Record task size and blast-radius reasons.
Require structured input decomposition and user requirement evidence.

components.condition: Block repo/state/Git writes unless an explicit labeled approval is present.
components.description: Require explicit approval before mutating rules/scripts/docs/git-sensitive scopes.
Require task-gate evidence for rules and script architecture changes.
Require session-gate evidence for rules and script architecture changes.

components.condition: Run before rules/governance architecture changes unless authoritative local evidence is sufficient and recorded.
components.description: Record external mature-practice checks for rules and script architecture changes.

components.condition: Run for Git stage, commit, push, worktree, dirty tree, or branch-state operations.
components.description: Enforce stage, commit, push, worktree, and dirty-tree boundaries.

components.condition: Run before creating or reusing a task worktree for mutating work. Use worktree-task create by default; raw git worktree add is a break-glass path that must record the reason and source snapshot handling.
components.description: Require an explicit task-worktree creation method and sparse-checkout strategy before task writes.
components.performance_budget: One task tracking file read; no Git scan.

components.condition: Run when a task may write, recover, merge, clean up, or claim final worktree state.
components.description: Reconcile coord/session/queue records against Git live worktree state before writes, resume, merge cleanup, or final output.
components.performance_budget: One git worktree list per repository and one coord state read per repository.

components.condition: Run after live-state reconciliation and before the first file or Git write.
components.description: Require task-level worktree isolation before repository writes.

components.condition: Run at the host-client write boundary. Entry documents and model instructions are insufficient; host-client writes must be backed by an approved active task and a task worktree row.
components.description: Fail closed before mutating writes unless task-record proves explicit approval and task worktree evidence.

metadata.blocked_gap: client can otherwise write files or run shell commands after reading prose rules only

components.performance_budget: single SQLite task-record read; no repository scan

components.condition: Run when an ai-client-governance worktree merge or embedded submodule closeout is in scope; the node checks the host gitlink plus task state/tracking, not only the child repository.
components.description: Verify host repository gitlink, worktree state, and task tracking after embedded ai-client-governance merges.
components.performance_budget: One host git status, one gitlink lookup, one state JSON read, and targeted task tracking reads.

components.condition: Run before spawning delegated agents and before sending follow-up work to an existing agent; reuse only when task id, scope, retained facts, heartbeat freshness, and contamination checks pass.
components.description: Decide whether to reuse an existing agent context, spawn a new agent, merge work, or close completed agents.
components.performance_budget: local status/brief/capsule inspection only; do not read full chat history by default

components.description: Require Agent Brief before spawning delegated agents.

metadata.dispatch_adapter: worktree-task dispatch records agent_dispatch_brief when task_type includes multi-agent

components.condition: Use when updating host-client Todo or task UI projections; Todo state must be regenerated from task-queue/task-record rather than treated as an independent fact source.
components.description: Expose client Todo lists as a derived view from durable task-queue/task-record state.
components.performance_budget: single SQLite task-queue read; no repository scan

components.condition: Run for multi-agent task tracking; deprecated 子 AI tables are rejected instead of treated as a compatibility path.
components.description: Require structured cross-client multi-agent acceptance matrix evidence.
components.mechanism_label: task-gate validates ## 多 Agent 验收矩阵

components.condition: Run before final-output, worktree closeout, host closeout, or task-queue done for multi-agent tasks; every executor task or leaf must have an independent reviewer Agent and client_type.
components.description: Require final cross-client Agent review pass/fail facts before closing multi-agent work.
Preserve pending-task recovery state for long-running work.

components.condition: Run at session start or status output; this is not a timed scheduler.
components.description: Run per-session embedded ai-client-governance sync state checks.

components.condition: Run when recovering or reporting long-running state; this is not a timed scheduler.
components.description: Audit long-running state before closeout, resume, or status output.
Check changed paths for diff and whitespace hazards.
Bubble document-index checks through README and reference scopes.
After rules, scripts, skills, manifest, or docs change, require affected-document and reference sync judgement.

metadata.performance_budget: aggregate changed paths and run one indexed reference check per gate-pool invocation
metadata.requires_tracking_evidence: record affected docs, updated docs/references, or no-impact rationale

components.description: Check Markdown references and cycle-risk boundaries.
Check Markdown references when changed paths contain Markdown.
Run document reference index checks when changed paths contain Markdown.
Run one scoped document impact index for changed rules, scripts, manifests, and docs.

metadata.observability: visible in runtime components and gate-pool dry-run

components.description: Export and visually check affected resume PDFs.
Compile changed Python files.
Validate UTF-8 and text source hygiene for changed text files.

components.condition: Run after content changes and before final output for prompt injection, sensitive text, command injection, supply-chain, and path-boundary risk. The plugin cannot intercept host-native shell internally, so the enforceable surface is governed file/command paths plus fail-closed diagnostics.
components.description: Assess changed text files through the unified local security policy gate.

metadata.policy_backend: local-rule-based-now; future OPA/declarative backend can replace this gate

components.performance_budget: Read changed text files once with deterministic regex policy; no network or model call.

components.description: Validate changed Markdown document task evidence.
Scan correction records when correction work is in scope.
Scan correction records when changed paths touch corrections.
Run git diff whitespace validation for changed paths.

components.condition: Run after changes and before final answer when implementation or docs claim completion.
components.description: Plan task completion tests from changed paths, task types, and acceptance criteria.
components.performance_budget: Read-only path classification plus optional task tracking evidence scan.

components.condition: Run before user-visible plans, status reports, and final conclusions.
components.description: Audit Git/worktree state at plan, status, and final output boundaries without pushing.
components.performance_budget: One git status --short --branch per relevant repository.

components.description: Check final answer quality and user satisfaction coverage.
Ensure final response covers user-visible acceptance criteria.
Ensure document/index sync status is reflected in final output.
Report whether registered governance nodes were visible, executed, de-duplicated, and efficient enough.

metadata.evidence: runtime components registry, gate-pool plan, tool-flow trace, and task tracking validation notes

components.description: Report completed, unverified, blocked, active pending, and Git/worktree state.

components.condition: Run before the final reply when analysis found problems, risks, follow-up tasks, or no-action decisions; facts must land in task-record, task-queue, framework-debt, correction, pending, or an explicit no-action row.
components.description: Fail final output unless newly discovered issues are recorded or explicitly marked no-action.
components.performance_budget: single SQLite task-record read; no repository scan

components.description: Validate ai-client-governance architecture and no-legacy-fallback boundaries before closeout.

components.condition: Run before closeout so generated DB/log/worktree artifacts cannot be committed by the host project.
components.description: Validate host-project .ai-client file ownership, .gitignore runtime block, and tracked live-state.
components.performance_budget: One git ls-files, one git status --ignored, and one .gitignore read.

components.description: Validate task-type, user requirement, and output closeout evidence.
Validate session closeout evidence.
Validate active task queue state before closeout.

components.condition: Run when reporting function-calling/tool schema, compact output policy, or host-client capability boundaries.
components.description: Report schema-first tool gateway specs and host-client dispatch boundary.

metadata.capability_boundary: Schemas are plugin-enforceable when this gateway is called; mandatory host agent dispatch requires host-client integration.

components.performance_budget: constant-size in-process schema render; no repository scan or DB write

components.condition: Run when execution volume, duration, cache, duplicate, failure, or trace statistics are needed.
components.description: Report unified execution telemetry from aicg.db.
components.performance_budget: read indexed SQLite execution_spans/execution_events only; no command execution

components.condition: Run when final or status output depends on execution telemetry coverage.
components.description: Report governed shell invocation evidence and any host-client raw-shell integration gap.

metadata.fact_source: .ai-client/project/state/aicg.db plus optional PowerShell profile marker; command proxy must not write user profiles
metadata.non_invasive_default: no-profile command proxy, comparable to a project-local virtual environment activation

components.performance_budget: read local env and indexed SQLite telemetry events; profile marker is optional explicit opt-in evidence

components.condition: Run before final output when structured task records and workflow queue state may diverge.
components.description: Report task-record and task-queue scope differences for recovery and monitoring.

reports: current task presence in both stores

components.performance_budget: read one SQLite DB summary and queue state only

components.condition: Run when a design flaw is real but needs a framework-level change window, such as CLI parser ergonomics or repo-context-aware scope classification.
components.description: Report open framework design debt before architecture passes.
components.performance_budget: single SQLite read; no repository scan

components.description: Verify trace flow after final gates.

components.condition: Run when reporting current execution health, final closeout, or resumed task state.
components.description: Report task-run cache, execution telemetry, and worktree coordination diagnostics.

reports: shell adapter evidence and raw shell interception gap

components.performance_budget: read SQLite telemetry and coord state only; no command execution

components.condition: Run after command-compression analysis for mutating tasks; readonly and validation groups may parallelize/cache, stateful groups remain ordered and no-cache.
components.description: Execute compressed command groups for mutating tasks, including small edits, once commands are ready.
components.performance_budget: single local DAG pass; cache only readonly/validation nodes with declared inputs; telemetry writes to aicg.db are mandatory by default

components.condition: Run when important local commands must prove shell coverage. Task-run/tool telemetry can prove commands were wrapped, while local env activation or no-profile command-proxy telemetry closes the raw host shell gap for governed commands; profile shims are explicit opt-in only.
components.description: Fail closed when a mutating task claims raw host shell coverage without auto-intercept or command-proxy evidence.

metadata.wrapped_telemetry_policy: task-run/tool telemetry counts as compensation evidence; shell-adapter command-proxy telemetry clears raw_shell_gap for governed commands without touching user profiles

components.performance_budget: read SQLite/JSONL telemetry and optional profile marker only; no command execution or profile writes

task_types.description: Code debugging, logs, exceptions, and behavior fixes.
User correction, missed requirement, or process failure.
AI Client Governance, scripts, skills, lifecycle, gates, or adapters.
Markdown documents, README, references, indexes, or links.
Git staging, commits, pushes, worktrees, and branch state.
Frontend, browser, Playwright, local UI, and localhost work.
Resume markdown, PDF export, layout, and delivery files.
Sub-agent, multi-agent, delegation, and acceptance matrix work.
Pending tasks, recovery, periodic checks, and long-running work.
